title: Invalid Input Error: Malformed JSON at byte 1571 of input: unexpected content after document.
description:
### What happens?

When I query a specific key in the JSON, it returns an error indicating that the JSON format is incorrect.

### To Reproduce

file url: https://cdn.functorz.com/log/output1.parquet

```sql
SELECT json_extract(content, '$.bodyBytesSent') from 'output1.parquet' where content like '%operationName%';
```

### OS:

mac

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.3

### DuckDB Client:

cli

### Hardware:

Macintosh HD

### Full Name:

shenghui

### Affiliation:

momen

### What is the latest build you tested with? If possible, we recommend testing with the latest nightly build.

I have not tested with any build

### Did you include all relevant data sets for reproducing the issue?

No - Other reason (please specify in the issue body)

### Did you include all code required to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have

### Did you include all relevant configuration (e.g., CPU architecture, Python version, Linux distribution) to reproduce the issue?

- [x] Yes, I have
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_json_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content JSON NOT NULL);
SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(content, '$.bodyBytesSent')) FROM test_json_data WHERE content IS NOT NULL;
SELECT content FROM test_json_data WHERE NOT JSON_VALID(content);
key_bug_features: Invalid JSON format when querying specific key
